description: Multi-hub Pareto front demonstration using catalog_multihub. 2 lamps + 2 sensors + 2 plugs, generous budget. The catalog has ultra-quality yandex-zigbee (q=0.98) and tuya-zigbee (q=0.97) devices; the aqara hub is intentionally basic quality (q=0.85) so that H=1-all-aqara (Q~0.930) is beaten by H=2 solutions. Expected 4-point Pareto front: (E=1 H=0 Q~0.913), (E=2 H=1 Q~0.930), (E=2 H=2 Q~0.940), (E=3 H=3 Q~0.942). BF estimated ~40s.
